title: Device Principal
riido_task: RIID-4868 [Contracts] device principal 소유권 SSOT 정의
summary: DevicePrincipal separates daemon credentials from browser user tokens and fixes account-owned device/runtime liveness evidence.
invariants: daemon identity uses DevicePrincipal credentials, not browser JWT
workspace_id scopes agent APIs but does not own device records
device_secret is one-time readable and never exposed to generated frontend state
stale runtimes are historical records, not new assignment binding candidates

loop.observation: DevicePrincipal ownership and secret-boundary rules existed as long prose plus policy strings, while CI could not prove the prose, API metadata, dependency map, and runtime binding DTO stayed aligned.
loop.hypothesis: A small executable vocabulary package plus a verifier can turn the principal model into evidence instead of hand-maintained explanation.
loop.execute: Verify package constants, generated API policy metadata, dependency-map liveness phrases, and assignment.AgentRuntimeBinding shape from one manifest.
loop.evaluate: CI emits device-principal evidence JSON and regenerates this reader; drift in headers, cadence, policy rules, dependency phrases, or DTO fields fails the verifier.
loop.retrospective: Future revocation, rotation, or storage changes should extend this manifest/tool before downstream repos reinterpret daemon identity semantics.
